results.title: White House shooting suspect dies in hospital
results.description: A suspect involved in a shooting near the White House was shot after opening fire on a US Secret Service checkpoint on Saturday night (local time), according to CBS News and a Secret Service spokesperson. He later died in hospital.Preliminary investigation revealed that the suspect approached the checkpoint, pulled a weapon out of his bag and began firing on officers. The Secret Service officers also opened fire and struck the suspect. He was taken to a hospital, where he died, as per CBS News. His name has not been released. A bystander was also struck by gunfire, but it was unclear whether the bystander was hit by gunfire from the suspect or the officers. The bystander's condition was not immediately provided. The US Secret Service in its statement said, "Shortly after 6 p.m Saturday an individual in the area of 17th street and Pennsylvania Avenue pulled a weapon from his bag and began firing." "Secret Service Police returned fire striking the suspect who was transported to an area hospital where he was pronounced deceased. During the shooting one bystander was also struck by gunfire. No injuries were sustained by officers. The President was in the White House during the incident, however no protectees or operations were impacted. This incident remains under investigation and additional information will be released as it becomes available," it further read. US Speaker Mike Johnson lauded the work by the secret service. Assistant to the President, Steven Cheung said that US President Donald Trump was working when the incident happened and is still working. In a post on X, Cheung said, "President Trump is working at 8:00 PM. Can't stop, won't stop." Secretary of the US Department of Homeland Security Markwayne Mullin lauded the work by Secret Service Officers and said, "I am closely monitoring the shooting incident near the White House and will update the public as we have more information. Tonight's shooting is a reminder of the dangers our law enforcement officers face every day. I am thankful for the bravery and swift action of the Secret Service officers involved. Thankfully, no officers were harmed." (ANI)

results.title: NFL analyst’s explosive Dianna Russini theory reignites Mike Vrabel drama as Sean McVay rumors resurface
results.description: Fresh speculation surrounding Dianna Russini has once again stirred NFL headlines after comments involving Mike Vrabel and resurfaced rumors tied to Sean McVay spread online. During a WEEI appearance, NFL analyst Mike Florio described Russini as the “wild card” in the ongoing Vrabel controversy, while Robert Littal revived an old rumor connected to McVay’s Washington days. Neither Russini nor McVay publicly addressed the viral claims, but the NFL world continues buzzing over the growing offseason drama.

results.title: Today Breaking News | সকাল ৮-টার বড় খবর | Suvendu Adhikari | Falta Election Results | Weather News
results.description: Today Breaking News | সকাল ৮-টার বড় খবর | Suvendu Adhikari | Falta Election Results | Weather Falta Election Results | আজ ফলতার ফল। ভোটের আগেই ময়দান ছাড়েন তৃণমূল প্রার্থী জাহাঙ্গির। আধাসেনার ঘেরাটোপে একুশে মে উৎসবের মেজাজে পুনর্নির্বাচন। ভয়হীন ভোটে রায় কোন দিকে? হাইভোল্টেজ আসনের রেজাল্ট, নিউজ18 বাংলায় সবার আগে।Ayushman Bharat | রাজ্যে ডাবল এঞ্জিনের সুফল। জুলাই থেকে আয়ুষ্মান ভারত কার্ডের সুবিধা রাজ্যবাসীর। প্রাথমিকভাবে স্বাস্থ্যসাথির আওতায় থাকা ৬ কোটি উপভোক্তাকে বিনামূল্যে চিকিৎসা পরিষেবার সুবিধা। ৯৭৬ কোটি টাকা বরাদ্দ করল কেন্দ্র।Suvendu Adhikari | বিজেপি আমলে বাংলার রেলপথে নয়া গতি। তৃণমূল জমানায় আটকে থাকা ৬১টি প্রকল্পের কাজ শুরু। জমি অধিগ্রহণ করে হস্তান্তর বলে দাবি। ডাবল এঞ্জিন ডোজে চিংড়িহাটাতেও মেট্রোর কাজ দ্রুত শেষ। বার্তা মুখ্যমন্ত্রীর। n18oc_kolkataWatch LIVE updates from News18 Bangla for the latest news from West Bengal, Kolkata, India, and around the world. Today’s top headlines include updates on Suvendu Adhikari Delhi visit, শুভেন্দু অধিকারী, Mamata Banerjee, TMC meeting at Kalighat, TMC councillors and KMC developments, Kolkata bus crisis, private bus strike. Major state developments also include updates on Sandip Ghosh, demolition linked to the former RG Kar Principal’s residence, ED raids in West Bengal, Jay Kamdar ED case, Tiljala illegal building demolition, press conference by Subhankar Sarkar, Ashok Kirtania press conference, along with updates on sand smuggling and Arjun Singh.
